nasb.text: Judah and the land of Israel, they were your traders; with the wheat of Minnith, cakes, honey, oil and balm they paid for your merchandise.

esv.text: Judah and the land of Israel traded with you; they exchanged for your merchandise wheat of Minnith, meal, honey, oil, and balm.

cnv.text: 猶大和以色列地都與你通商；他們用米匿的麥子、餅、蜜、油和乳香來換取你的商品。

ccb.text: 犹大和以色列也是你的客商，他们用米匿的麦、饼、蜜、油和香料与你交换货物。
